headline: Assessing Charles River Laboratories (CRL) Valuation After Progress In Virtual Control Group Toxicology Studies
summary: Charles River Laboratories International (CRL) recently reported that its virtual control groups in toxicology studies matched traditional control groups on key outcomes, supporting efforts to reduce animal use while keeping study quality intact. See our latest analysis for Charles River Laboratories International. At a share price of US$183.10, the stock has a 1 month share price return of 19.21%, but that sits against a 90 day share price decline of 19.26% and a 5 year total shareholder...
